nodes.label: Home Screen — Active Focus Session with AI Coach Whisper
nodes.description: Home screen in ACTIVE session state. Header badge 'SESIÓN ACTIVA' in teal. Title 'Estás en la zona.' with subtitle 'El ruido está fu...'. AI coach whisper card: 'Tu coach — Tu sesión acaba de empezar. ¿Te ayudo a organizarlos para aprovechar bien el tiempo? Ayúdame a organizarlos >' with teal CTA link. Large countdown timer '13:09' with 'quedan 46:51' below. Session meta: 'de 60 min · 13 min de claridad'. Red 'Finalizar sesión' button. Below: 'Sin apps protegidas' with 'Activar' pill button. 'Tu ritual de hoy' section: '0 de 0 completadas' with 'Agregar al ritual de hoy' CTA. 'Recordatorios' section: '3 activos'.

properties.title: Estás en la zona.
properties.coach_message: Tu sesión acaba de empezar. ¿Te ayudo a organizarlos para aprovechar bien el tiempo?

nodes.label: AI Coach Whisper Card — Proactive In-Session AI Nudge
nodes.description: A card component showing a proactive AI coach message during an active focus session. Icon/label 'Tu coach' with message text and a teal-colored CTA link 'Ayúdame a organizarlos >'. This is a contextual nudge that appears at session start, offering to help organize the session.

nodes.label: Session Timer Display — Large Countdown Clock Component
nodes.description: Large centered countdown timer shown during active focus sessions. Displays elapsed time prominently (e.g. '13:09', '13:25') with remaining time below (e.g. 'quedan 46:51', 'quedan 46:35'). Session meta line below: 'de 60 min · 13 min de claridad'. Appears in both active-whisper-v2 and split-sections-v1-scroll.
